title: Best Poster Award at VCBM 2025
description: Topology-Guided Volume Fusion for Multi-Energy Spectral Computed Tomography received the Best Poster Award.

title: TopoInVis paper on topology-aware spectral CT volume fusion
description: The spectral CT volume fusion work was published at TopoInVis 2025 and received an honorable mention.

title: TVCG paper on time-varying bivariate field analysis
description: Continuous Scatterplot and Image Moments for Time-Varying Bivariate Field Analysis of Electronic Structure Evolution appeared in IEEE TVCG.

title: Ph.D. defense at IISc Bangalore
description: Defended Ph.D. thesis titled Topological Structures and Operators for Bivariate Data Visualization.
